# Pour Picks

> Pour Picks is a hobby and lifestyle iOS app for adult bourbon collectors.
> It catalogs your cellar, scans bottles to identify what you own, tracks
> the value of your collection, and provides a private journal for every
> pour. The app does not sell alcohol, show alcohol ads, or encourage
> consumption. It is a reference and personal-collection tool for adults
> of legal drinking age.

## Site
- [Home](https://pourpicks.app/): app overview, features, FAQ
- [About](https://pourpicks.app/about): who runs Pour Picks, editorial standards, what the app is and is not
- [Articles](https://pourpicks.app/articles): guides for bourbon collectors (storage, oxidation, valuation, identification)
- [Support](https://pourpicks.app/support): account deletion, subscription cancellation, scanner tips
- [Privacy Policy](https://pourpicks.app/privacy): data collection and handling
- [Terms of Use](https://pourpicks.app/terms): eligibility, subscriptions, responsibility notice
- [Delete Account](https://pourpicks.app/delete-account): how to permanently delete your account and data

## Optional
- [Sitemap](https://pourpicks.app/sitemap-index.xml): full URL index updated on every build
